layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl for surfaces, sharp edges for strict tech sections
layout_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: TETRIS GRID for Home, MODE B: CONTROL ROOM for ModelGuard.

motion_and_3d.hero_3d: react-three-fiber for a floating purple hexagonal 'P' logo with particles. Ambient and point lighting.
motion_and_3d.card_hover: Framer Motion 3D tilt. subtle parallax on image.

image_urls.description: Anonymous hacker silhouette profile for the founder section.
Abstract dark purple 3D geometric hexagon. Use as fallback if 3D canvas fails.
Dark dashboard interface for ModelGuard product imagery.

home.hero: R3F 3D animated hexagon logo on one side, massive Outfit heading on the other. Waitlist input.
home.products: Two large bento cards for Task Anchor & ModelGuard. Link to separate product detail pages.
home.automations: Editorial ribbon marquee scrolling slowly. Monospace font.
home.about_teaser: Anonymous founder preview linking to About page.
home.footer: Large Pyrintu text, links to pages, and social links (LinkedIn, GitHub, X, Instagram, YouTube).

about.content: Mission, vision, and the anonymous 'Solo founder building in public from Hyderabad' card.

insights.content: Blog teaser section with grid cards.

contact.content: Mailto links + Waitlist capture form connected to MongoDB.

components.buttons: Use flat background with slight hover lift and box-shadow glow. Apply data-testid.
components.cards: 1px border-white/10, bg-white/[0.02], large padding (p-8 to p-12).
components.inputs: Shadcn heavily customized, no vercel-look. Transparent background, sharp focus rings.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto anywhere. Use 'Outfit' for headings, 'Manrope' for body.
DO NOT use the word 'vibecoder' anywhere on the site.
Store the Waitlist form data in a MongoDB collection (mocked if DB credentials not provided, but explicitly log it as MOCKED).
Ensure the hero is 3D using react-three-fiber and @react-three/drei. It MUST feature a purple hexagon with a sharp 'P'.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and links.
Multi-page application with React Router. Define specific routes for home, about, contact, task-anchor, modelguard, and insights.
Do NOT use placeholder texts or 'dummy' image services.
